title: CPU Scheduling Simulator
summary: Python simulator comparing FCFS and SJF scheduling algorithms with Gantt chart output.
description: A discrete event simulator built for an Operating Systems course. It models process arrival, burst times, and context switching, then compares First Come First Served against nonpreemptive Shortest Job First. Outputs a Gantt chart, average waiting time, and average turnaround time for each algorithm side by side.

title: TaskFlow Kanban Board
summary: Drag and drop task board built with vanilla JavaScript and the Fetch API.
description: A lightweight kanban board with drag and drop columns, local persistence, and keyboard accessibility. Built to practice DOM manipulation, event delegation, and CSS grid layout without any frontend framework.

title: Weather CLI
summary: Command line weather lookup tool written in Python with caching.
description: A small command line utility that fetches weather data for a given city, caches results locally to avoid repeat requests, and prints a compact colored summary in the terminal.
